SEARCH
Package Roles

Class User

java.lang.Object
Roles.User
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Employee, Student
public abstract class User extends Object implements Serializable
Abstract base class for all system users. Stores common account information such as id, login, password, full name and interface language. User is not created directly. Concrete roles such as Student, Teacher, Manager and Admin extend this class.
See Also:

    • checkPassword

      public boolean checkPassword(String rawPassword)
      Checks whether the provided password matches the user's password. The password itself is not exposed through a getter for security reasons.
      Parameters:
      rawPassword - password entered by user
      Returns:
      true if password is correct

    • changePassword

      public boolean changePassword(String oldPassword, String newPassword)
      Changes the user's password if the old password is correct.
      Parameters:
      oldPassword - current password
      newPassword - new password
      Returns:
      true if password was changed successfully
